name: swarm
description: Run a virtual startup org — founders, engineers, marketing — from inside Claude Code. Double Diamond phases (discover → define → develop → deliver). Claude.ai roundtrip helpers for visual exploration. GitHub / PostHog / Sentry MCPs for delivery.

github_token.title: GitHub token
github_token.description: PAT with repo + workflow scopes. Only needed in deliver phase for deploys and PR ops. Leave empty if you don't use the GitHub MCP.

posthog_api_key.title: PostHog personal API key
posthog_api_key.description: Personal API key from PostHog (Settings → Personal API keys). Used to create feature flags and inspect events. Leave empty if you don't use PostHog.

posthog_host.title: PostHog host
posthog_host.description: e.g. https://us.i.posthog.com or https://eu.i.posthog.com. Leave empty for the default.

posthog_project_id.title: PostHog project ID
posthog_project_id.description: Numeric project id. Find in PostHog project settings. Leave empty if you don't use PostHog.

sentry_auth_token.title: Sentry auth token
sentry_auth_token.description: Internal integration token (Settings → Auth Tokens). Only needed in deliver phase for issue lookups. Leave empty if you don't use Sentry.
